wordplay_note: Ironic — his life stinks despite the sweet name
card_description: Eric Sweetscent (meaning "Sweetscent = sweet smell") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Now Wait for Last Year*. Artificial organ surgeon trapped in a miserable marriage and a collapsing interstellar war. Name note: Ironic — his life stinks despite the sweet name. The healer who cannot heal his own situation. First appears in *Now Wait for Last Year*.

reference.brief: Artificial organ surgeon trapped in a miserable marriage and a collapsing interstellar war
reference.significance: The healer who cannot heal his own situation
